title: Giới từ (2) — Chuyển động, Mục đích, Nguyên nhân & Thể cách
summary: Giới từ chỉ chuyển động (across, through, into, onto...), mục đích (for, to), nguyên nhân (because of, owing to), thể cách (by, with, in, without).

sections.title: Giới từ chỉ sự chuyển động
sections.body:
## Giới từ chỉ sự chuyển động

| Giới từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **To** | đến một nơi nào đó | I will move to New York next week. |
| **from** | từ (xuất phát từ một địa điểm) | Where do you come from? |
| **away from** | chỉ sự di chuyển hướng ra xa | When you hear the alarm, run away from the building. |
| **across** | qua, ngang qua, băng qua (bề mặt phẳng) | He went across the street to buy a box of cigarette. |
| **along** | dọc theo | I walked along the street. / The flowers grow along the side of the wall. |
| **through** | xuyên qua (không gian 3 chiều, môi trường bao quanh) | The sun is shining through the window. / He walked through a wood. |
| **into** | vào trong | I silently walked into the room. |
| **onto** | lên trên (bề mặt) | The cat jumped onto the table. |
| **up** | lên trên (vị trí cao hơn) | They hiked up the mountain every morning. |
| **down** | xuống dưới | He fell down right on the stage. |
| **out of** | ra ngoài, ra khỏi | I can't get this ring out of my finger. / Fish can survive for only a short time out of water. |
| **past** | quá, qua (ngang qua một điểm) | He is past fifty. / He ran past the house. |
| **off** | tách khỏi, rời khỏi | The cover has come off the book. / She fell off the ladder. |
| **toward(s)** | về phía (hướng di chuyển nhưng chưa tới hẳn nơi đến) | He was running towards us. |

### Phân biệt Across, Over & Through

- Across: di chuyển từ bên này sang bên kia của một vật phẳng hoặc có các giới hạn như thành phố, sông, đường... Ví dụ: We took a boat across the river.
- Through: di chuyển trong không gian 3 chiều hoặc môi trường bao quanh (khu rừng, cỏ cao, sương mù...). Ví dụ: I love walking through the forest.
- Over: vượt qua phía trên vật thể, hoặc mang nghĩa bao trùm lên.

sections.title: Giới từ chỉ mục đích & nguyên nhân
sections.body:
## Giới từ chỉ mục đích

- **for + V-ing/Noun**: We stopped for a rest. / We use chalk for writing on a blackboard.
- **to = in order to = so as to + V-inf**: We use chalk to write on a blackboard. / I went out in order to post a letter.

## Giới từ chỉ nguyên nhân

- **for = because of = owing to + N/V-ing** (vì, bởi vì): Aileen is proud of her family for their support. / Thank you for inviting me to your party.
- **through** (vì (do sự thiếu sót, bỏ qua)): He didn't pass the exam through his ignorance. / It was through you that we were able to meet again.

sections.title: Giới từ chỉ thể cách & Vị trí giới từ
sections.body:
## Giới từ chỉ thể cách

| Giới từ | Nghĩa | Ví dụ |
|---|---|---|
| **by** | bằng cách, bằng phương tiện | The thief got in by breaking a window. / He made the cake by hand. |
| **in** | bằng (ngôn ngữ, chất liệu) | This book is written in English. / There is a statue in marble. |
| **with** | với, bằng (công cụ, cảm xúc) | They welcome us with smiles. / If loving you with all my heart is crime, then I'm guilty. |
| **without** | không có | You can't leave the country without a passport. / He said that he couldn't live without her. |

## Một số giới từ khác

### about

- Khoảng chừng (It is about 3 km)
- Về chủ đề gì (What do you think about that?)

### against

- Chống lại, trái với (struggle against)
- Đụng phải (He ran against the trunk)
- Dựa vào (I placed her against the trunk)
- So với (50 students against 40 last year)
- Chuẩn bị, dự trù (I saved $2,000 against my study next year)

### of

- Của (These are the works of Shakespeare)
- Thuộc (We are of the working class)
- Vì (My grandfather died of tuberculosis)
- Làm bằng (She has a house of wood)
- Gồm có (He is a man of ability)
- Trong số (One of my friends is a doctor)

### like

- Giống như (Don't talk like that! / He rides a white horse like mine)

### except

- Ngoại trừ (Everyone except me got an invitation)

## Vị trí của giới từ trong câu

1. Đứng ngay trước danh từ hay Đại từ (He usually visits me on Sundays / I bought a cake for him).
2. Đứng sau động từ (liền sau động từ hoặc bị từ khác xen giữa) (I live in Hanoi / I write a letter for him).
3. Đứng sau to be (Jean is at home right now / The picture is on the wall).
4. Đứng sau tính từ (I'm interested in reading / I'm not worried about living in a foreign country).
5. Trong mệnh đề quan hệ (giới từ đứng trước đại từ quan hệ hoặc đặt ở cuối câu) (To whom are you talking? = Whom are you talking to?).

exercises.question: I had passed the exam with the flying colors ___ studying constantly.

___the drought, crops are short
“Just stay ____ him ! He has gone down with the flu.

I walked ___ the office.

He’ll do anything ____ money.

We both jumed______the swimming pool at the same time
In PE classes we have to climb ____________ a rope in 20 seconds.
He caught the ball ___ his left hand.
The ball rolled ______ the lawn.
The king tried to drive the enemy_______ the seas
Who is not for me is .......... me.
I shall wait .......... you.
The country fought________independence
I study hard _____________ get a scholarship
He opened the door in order ____ get some fresh air in the room.
When are you coming ………… Hanoi?
Tears are streaming …….. her face.
We often go fishing _______ the river bank.
He was trying to throw his hat __________ the roof.
These are documents ……………..high-ranking officials
I took the envelope _____________ my pocket.

this novel is written …. Japanese
He thanked me …….my help
He sent me a souvenir …… post
She studies hard ….. pass the next exam.
I often sit alone to look ……… the window.
There is a bridge ……….. the river.
Sara got...... her car and shut the door
She sailed. …… the river
The train went ……… the tunnel.
He ran ………… the mountain
If there is any hazard alarm , quickly run ……. the house.
I went there ……………… Tom's car.
I tried to get …………… the car before it exploded.
You can park your car everywhere ……….. here.
You can’t enter this concert ____ a ticket.
Please cover the bowl and put it ……. the fridge
I could dance and sing ………… joy.
She entered the room…..knocking
Today I would like to tell you a little more ......... what is involved and what I do.
Lan often goes to school ….bus, but today she’s going….foot
I went ………… the mountain to cut wood.
The wind is whipping around the building, ……… the cracks in the doors and ………. the chimneys.
Unable to find the house keys, she climbed ……………..a window to get help.
please do it ………… my sake

exerciseSets.title: Luyện Tập Giới Từ 5 (50 câu - Trùng đề Livestream)

exercises.question: It’s typical ________businessmen to shake hands in formal meetings.
We were all shocked ________ the things we saw on the news.
I wouldn’t like to be in her position. I feel sorry ________ her.
Cheques are useful ________ travellers.
Are you successful ________ your experiment?
She seems friendly ________  everyone in the village.
She was sad ________ my refusal.
Ben isn’t very happy at college. He says he’s bored ________ the course he’s doing.
Quang Linh is popular ________ folk songs.
Why are you always so rude  ________ your parents? Can’t you be nice ________  them?
The student is quick ________understanding what the teacher explains.
She is never late ________ work.
Yesterday, Nga was absent ________ class because she was ill.
We always have the same food every day. I’m fed up ________ it.
Are you still upset ________ what I said to you yesterday?
I was surprised  ________  the way he behaved.
Don’t be worried ________ the money! I’ll lend you.
It’s made me much more sensitive ________ the needs of the disable.
Jane has been very concerned ________ her mother’s poor health.
Albert said he was very ashamed ________ his friend’s bad manners.
Can we be sure ________ his honesty?
Is he guilty or innocent ________ the crime?
Fred is capable ________ doing better work than he’s doing at present.
While studying, he was financially dependent ________ his parents.
If you’re not satisfied ________ your essay, I suggest that you rewrite it.
People nowadays are interested ________ saving money and natural resources.
We are fond ________ listening to music.
He is angry ________ losing his wallet.
That hotel is famous ________ it’s pleasant atmosphere and fine food.
I certainly hope that David is aware ________ all the problems involved.
Dogs are usually very faithful ________ their masters if treated properly.
I was amazed ________ his behavior.
I’m sure the explaination in the book will be quite clear ________ you.
Disneyland is crowded ________ tourists in July.
I wish Carl would take a vacation. It would be good ________his health.
Are you serious ________ learning to be an architect?
He is very keen ________ Englis, but he is not good ________ listening.
I am sorry ________the noise last night. We were having a party.
What he said was contrary ________ common sense.
The message he sent to me was full ________ mistakes.
Don’t worry. We’ll look after you. There is nothing to be scared________.
Linda doesn’t look very well. I’m worried ________ her.
She was experienced ________ marketing.
The word ‘man’ is derived ________ the Sanskrit ‘manas’.
He is not confused ________ animals and speaks very clearly about the panther, deer and their characteristics.
He is generally quite content ________ himself and his life.
This kind of thing happens sometimes, but I was annoyed ________ myself ________ handling it badly.
My problem was that I was brilliant ________ maths but hopeless ________ English.
The film is based ________ a novel by Pat Conroy.
These toys are not suitable ________ children under five.
